title: Ko Hentota
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Ko Hentota''' was a district of [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]]. A large ventilation nexus was buried in the lower levels. For a time in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], the [[Circus Horrificus/Legends|Circus Horrificus]] ran out of this nexus until an [[arqet]] escaped and attacked 12 spectators.

{{Loc-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Kohentota.jpg|thumb|right|250px|The first reference to "Ko Hentota".]]
The term "Ko Hentota" first appeared in a sketch of a desert [[Skiff/Legends|skiff]] by [[Joe Johnston]] during the production of [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Star Wars'': Episode VI ''Return of the Jedi'']]. In this context, carved panels "depicting phases of the Ko Hentota" decorated the skiff's hull, which indicate that it may have been originally conceived as an important event or ritual.
